# LocatorBarError Class

> [!CAUTION]
> This class is still in pre-release.  Its signature may change or it may be removed in future releases.

## Extends
- *Error*

Error thrown when a locator bar operation fails. Contains a reason code indicating the specific cause of the error.

## Properties

### **reason**
`read-only reason: LocatorBarErrorReason;`

The [*@minecraft/server.LocatorBarErrorReason*](../../../scriptapi/minecraft/server/LocatorBarErrorReason.md) code that indicates why the locator bar operation failed.

Type: [*LocatorBarErrorReason*](LocatorBarErrorReason.md)

Notes:
  - This property can be read in early-execution mode.
